color_icon.label: Color Widget Icon
color_icon.desc: Use the lightbar color for the bar widget icon

hide_empty.label: Hide When Disconnected
hide_empty.desc: Hide the bar widget if no controllers are detected

settings.info_desc1: This plugin controls DS4/DualSense LED colors via sysfs.
settings.info_desc2: If colors don't apply, run: sudo ./scripts/setup_rules.sh
